rawMembers.name: angular_limit_x/damping
rawMembers.summary: The amount of rotational damping across the X axis. The lower, the longer an impulse from one side takes to travel to the other side.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_x/enabled
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], rotation across the X axis is limited.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_x/erp
rawMembers.summary: When rotating across the X axis, this error tolerance factor defines how much the correction gets slowed down. The lower, the slower.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_x/force_limit
rawMembers.summary: The maximum amount of force that can occur, when rotating around the X axis.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_x/lower_angle
rawMembers.summary: The minimum rotation in negative direction to break loose and rotate around the X axis.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_x/restitution
rawMembers.summary: The amount of rotational restitution across the X axis. The lower, the more restitution occurs.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_x/softness
rawMembers.summary: The speed of all rotations across the X axis.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_x/upper_angle
rawMembers.summary: The minimum rotation in positive direction to break loose and rotate around the X axis.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_y/damping
rawMembers.summary: The amount of rotational damping across the Y axis. The lower, the more damping occurs.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_y/enabled
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], rotation across the Y axis is limited.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_y/erp
rawMembers.summary: When rotating across the Y axis, this error tolerance factor defines how much the correction gets slowed down. The lower, the slower.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_y/force_limit
rawMembers.summary: The maximum amount of force that can occur, when rotating around the Y axis.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_y/lower_angle
rawMembers.summary: The minimum rotation in negative direction to break loose and rotate around the Y axis.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_y/restitution
rawMembers.summary: The amount of rotational restitution across the Y axis. The lower, the more restitution occurs.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_y/softness
rawMembers.summary: The speed of all rotations across the Y axis.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_y/upper_angle
rawMembers.summary: The minimum rotation in positive direction to break loose and rotate around the Y axis.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_z/damping
rawMembers.summary: The amount of rotational damping across the Z axis. The lower, the more damping occurs.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_z/enabled
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], rotation across the Z axis is limited.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_z/erp
rawMembers.summary: When rotating across the Z axis, this error tolerance factor defines how much the correction gets slowed down. The lower, the slower.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_z/force_limit
rawMembers.summary: The maximum amount of force that can occur, when rotating around the Z axis.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_z/lower_angle
rawMembers.summary: The minimum rotation in negative direction to break loose and rotate around the Z axis.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_z/restitution
rawMembers.summary: The amount of rotational restitution across the Z axis. The lower, the more restitution occurs.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_z/softness
rawMembers.summary: The speed of all rotations across the Z axis.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit_z/upper_angle
rawMembers.summary: The minimum rotation in positive direction to break loose and rotate around the Z axis.

rawMembers.name: angular_motor_x/enabled
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], a rotating motor at the X axis is enabled.

rawMembers.name: angular_motor_x/force_limit
rawMembers.summary: Maximum acceleration for the motor at the X axis.

rawMembers.name: angular_motor_x/target_velocity
rawMembers.summary: Target speed for the motor at the X axis.

rawMembers.name: angular_motor_y/enabled
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], a rotating motor at the Y axis is enabled.

rawMembers.name: angular_motor_y/force_limit
rawMembers.summary: Maximum acceleration for the motor at the Y axis.

rawMembers.name: angular_motor_y/target_velocity
rawMembers.summary: Target speed for the motor at the Y axis.

rawMembers.name: angular_motor_z/enabled
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], a rotating motor at the Z axis is enabled.

rawMembers.name: angular_motor_z/force_limit
rawMembers.summary: Maximum acceleration for the motor at the Z axis.

rawMembers.name: angular_motor_z/target_velocity
rawMembers.summary: Target speed for the motor at the Z axis.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit_x/damping
rawMembers.summary: The amount of damping that happens at the X motion.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit_x/enabled
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], the linear motion across the X axis is limited.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit_x/lower_distance
rawMembers.summary: The minimum difference between the pivot points' X axis.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit_x/restitution
rawMembers.summary: The amount of restitution on the X axis movement. The lower, the more momentum gets lost.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit_x/softness
rawMembers.summary: A factor applied to the movement across the X axis. The lower, the slower the movement.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit_x/upper_distance
rawMembers.summary: The maximum difference between the pivot points' X axis.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit_y/damping
rawMembers.summary: The amount of damping that happens at the Y motion.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit_y/enabled
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], the linear motion across the Y axis is limited.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit_y/lower_distance
rawMembers.summary: The minimum difference between the pivot points' Y axis.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit_y/restitution
rawMembers.summary: The amount of restitution on the Y axis movement. The lower, the more momentum gets lost.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit_y/softness
rawMembers.summary: A factor applied to the movement across the Y axis. The lower, the slower the movement.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit_y/upper_distance
rawMembers.summary: The maximum difference between the pivot points' Y axis.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit_z/damping
rawMembers.summary: The amount of damping that happens at the Z motion.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit_z/enabled
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], the linear motion across the Z axis is limited.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit_z/lower_distance
rawMembers.summary: The minimum difference between the pivot points' Z axis.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit_z/restitution
rawMembers.summary: The amount of restitution on the Z axis movement. The lower, the more momentum gets lost.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit_z/softness
rawMembers.summary: A factor applied to the movement across the Z axis. The lower, the slower the movement.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit_z/upper_distance
rawMembers.summary: The maximum difference between the pivot points' Z axis.

rawMembers.name: linear_motor_x/enabled
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], then there is a linear motor on the X axis. It will attempt to reach the target velocity while staying within the force limits.

rawMembers.name: linear_motor_x/force_limit
rawMembers.summary: The maximum force the linear motor can apply on the X axis while trying to reach the target velocity.

rawMembers.name: linear_motor_x/target_velocity
rawMembers.summary: The speed that the linear motor will attempt to reach on the X axis.

rawMembers.name: linear_motor_y/enabled
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], then there is a linear motor on the Y axis. It will attempt to reach the target velocity while staying within the force limits.

rawMembers.name: linear_motor_y/force_limit
rawMembers.summary: The maximum force the linear motor can apply on the Y axis while trying to reach the target velocity.

rawMembers.name: linear_motor_y/target_velocity
rawMembers.summary: The speed that the linear motor will attempt to reach on the Y axis.

rawMembers.name: linear_motor_z/enabled
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], then there is a linear motor on the Z axis. It will attempt to reach the target velocity while staying within the force limits.

rawMembers.name: linear_motor_z/force_limit
rawMembers.summary: The maximum force the linear motor can apply on the Z axis while trying to reach the target velocity.

rawMembers.name: linear_motor_z/target_velocity
rawMembers.summary: The speed that the linear motor will attempt to reach on the Z axis.

values.name: FLAG_ENABLE_ANGULAR_LIMIT
values.summary: If enabled, rotational motion is possible within the given limits.

values.name: FLAG_ENABLE_LINEAR_LIMIT
values.summary: If enabled, linear motion is possible within the given limits.

values.name: FLAG_ENABLE_LINEAR_MOTOR
values.summary: If enabled, there is a linear motor across these axes.

values.name: FLAG_ENABLE_MOTOR
values.summary: If enabled, there is a rotational motor across these axes.

values.name: FLAG_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum Flag] enum.

values.name: PARAM_ANGULAR_DAMPING
values.summary: The amount of rotational damping across the axes. The lower, the more damping occurs.

values.name: PARAM_ANGULAR_ERP
values.summary: When rotating across the axes, this error tolerance factor defines how much the correction gets slowed down. The lower, the slower.

values.name: PARAM_ANGULAR_FORCE_LIMIT
values.summary: The maximum amount of force that can occur, when rotating around the axes.

values.name: PARAM_ANGULAR_LIMIT_SOFTNESS
values.summary: The speed of all rotations across the axes.

values.name: PARAM_ANGULAR_LOWER_LIMIT
values.summary: The minimum rotation in negative direction to break loose and rotate around the axes.

values.name: PARAM_ANGULAR_MOTOR_FORCE_LIMIT
values.summary: Maximum acceleration for the motor at the axes.

values.name: PARAM_ANGULAR_MOTOR_TARGET_VELOCITY
values.summary: Target speed for the motor at the axes.

values.name: PARAM_ANGULAR_RESTITUTION
values.summary: The amount of rotational restitution across the axes. The lower, the more restitution occurs.

values.name: PARAM_ANGULAR_UPPER_LIMIT
values.summary: The minimum rotation in positive direction to break loose and rotate around the axes.

values.name: PARAM_LINEAR_DAMPING
values.summary: The amount of damping that happens at the linear motion across the axes.

values.name: PARAM_LINEAR_LIMIT_SOFTNESS
values.summary: A factor applied to the movement across the axes. The lower, the slower the movement.

values.name: PARAM_LINEAR_LOWER_LIMIT
values.summary: The minimum difference between the pivot points' axes.

values.name: PARAM_LINEAR_MOTOR_FORCE_LIMIT
values.summary: The maximum force the linear motor will apply while trying to reach the velocity target.

values.name: PARAM_LINEAR_MOTOR_TARGET_VELOCITY
values.summary: The velocity the linear motor will try to reach.

values.name: PARAM_LINEAR_RESTITUTION
values.summary: The amount of restitution on the axes' movement. The lower, the more momentum gets lost.

values.name: PARAM_LINEAR_UPPER_LIMIT
values.summary: The maximum difference between the pivot points' axes.

values.name: PARAM_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum Param] enum.

constants.summary: The maximum force the linear motor will apply while trying to reach the velocity target.
